initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT SUM(home_team_goal) AS total_home_goals
FROM Match
JOIN Player ON (
    Match.home_player_X1 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.home_player_X2 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.home_player_X3 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.home_player_X4 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.home_player_X5 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.home_player_X6 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.home_player_X7 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.home_player_X8 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.home_player_X9 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.home_player_X10 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.home_player_X11 = Player.player_api_id
)
WHERE (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', Player.birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', Player.birthday)) <= 30;

SELECT SUM(Match.home_team_goal) AS total_home_goals
FROM Match
JOIN Player ON Match.home_player_X1 = Player.player_api_id
WHERE (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', Player.birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', Player.birthday)) <= 30

UNION ALL

    Match.home_player_X6 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.home_player_X7 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.home_player_X8 = Player.player_api_id OR

)
WHERE strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', Player.birthday) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', Player.birthday)) <= 30;

SELECT SUM(Match.home_team_goal) AS total_home_goals
FROM Match
JOIN Player ON (
    Match.home_player_X1 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.home_player_X2 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.home_player_X3 = Player.player_api_id OR

)
WHERE (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', Player.birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', Player.birthday)) <= 30;

SELECT SUM(home_team_goal) AS total_home_goals
FROM Match m
JOIN Player p1 ON m.home_player_1 = p1.player_api_id
JOIN Player p2 ON m.home_player_2 = p2.player_api_id
JOIN Player p3 ON m.home_player_3 = p3.player_api_id
JOIN Player p4 ON m.home_player_4 = p4.player_api_id
JOIN Player p5 ON m.home_player_5 = p5.player_api_id
JOIN Player p6 ON m.home_player_6 = p6.player_api_id
JOIN Player p7 ON m.home_player_7 = p7.player_api_id
JOIN Player p8 ON m.home_player_8 = p8.player_api_id
JOIN Player p9 ON m.home_player_9 = p9.player_api_id
JOIN Player p10 ON m.home_player_10 = p10.player_api_id
JOIN Player p11 ON m.home_player_11 = p11.player_api_id
WHERE (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p1.birthday)) <= 30
   OR (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p2.birthday)) <= 30
   OR (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p3.birthday)) <= 30
   OR (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p4.birthday)) <= 30
   OR (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p5.birthday)) <= 30
   OR (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p6.birthday)) <= 30
   OR (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p7.birthday)) <= 30
   OR (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p8.birthday)) <= 30
   OR (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p9.birthday)) <= 30
   OR (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p10.birthday)) <= 30
   OR (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p11.birthday)) <= 30;

)
WHERE strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', Player.birthday) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', Player.birthday)) <= 30;

candidates.sql:
SELECT SUM(home_team_goal) AS total_home_goals
FROM Match m
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Player p
    WHERE (
        p.player_api_id = m.home_player_1 OR
        p.player_api_id = m.home_player_2 OR
        p.player_api_id = m.home_player_3 OR
        p.player_api_id = m.home_player_4 OR
        p.player_api_id = m.home_player_5 OR
        p.player_api_id = m.home_player_6 OR
        p.player_api_id = m.home_player_7 OR
        p.player_api_id = m.home_player_8 OR
        p.player_api_id = m.home_player_9 OR
        p.player_api_id = m.home_player_10 OR
        p.player_api_id = m.home_player_11
    )
    AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.birthday) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.birthday))) <= 30
);

SELECT SUM(home_team_goal) AS total_home_goals
FROM Match m
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Player p
    WHERE (m.home_player_1 = p.player_api_id OR
           m.home_player_2 = p.player_api_id OR
           m.home_player_3 = p.player_api_id OR
           m.home_player_4 = p.player_api_id OR
           m.home_player_5 = p.player_api_id OR
           m.home_player_6 = p.player_api_id OR
           m.home_player_7 = p.player_api_id OR
           m.home_player_8 = p.player_api_id OR
           m.home_player_9 = p.player_api_id OR
           m.home_player_10 = p.player_api_id OR
           m.home_player_11 = p.player_api_id)
      AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.birthday) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.birthday))) <= 30
);

SELECT SUM(home_team_goal) AS total_home_goals
FROM Match m
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT 1 AS pos, home_player_1 AS player_api_id FROM Match
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 2, home_player_2 FROM Match
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 3, home_player_3 FROM Match
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 4, home_player_4 FROM Match
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 5, home_player_5 FROM Match
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 6, home_player_6 FROM Match
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 7, home_player_7 FROM Match
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 8, home_player_8 FROM Match
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 9, home_player_9 FROM Match
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 10, home_player_10 FROM Match
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 11, home_player_11 FROM Match
) players ON m.id = m.id
JOIN Player p ON players.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.birthday)) <= 30;

WITH home_players AS (
  SELECT home_team_goal, home_player_1 AS player_api_id FROM Match
  UNION ALL
  SELECT home_team_goal, home_player_2 AS player_api_id FROM Match
  UNION ALL
  SELECT home_team_goal, home_player_3 AS player_api_id FROM Match
  UNION ALL
  SELECT home_team_goal, home_player_4 AS player_api_id FROM Match
  UNION ALL
  SELECT home_team_goal, home_player_5 AS player_api_id FROM Match
  UNION ALL
  SELECT home_team_goal, home_player_6 AS player_api_id FROM Match
  UNION ALL
  SELECT home_team_goal, home_player_7 AS player_api_id FROM Match
  UNION ALL
  SELECT home_team_goal, home_player_8 AS player_api_id FROM Match
  UNION ALL
  SELECT home_team_goal, home_player_9 AS player_api_id FROM Match
  UNION ALL
  SELECT home_team_goal, home_player_10 AS player_api_id FROM Match
  UNION ALL
  SELECT home_team_goal, home_player_11 AS player_api_id FROM Match
)
SELECT SUM(hp.home_team_goal) AS total_home_goals
FROM home_players hp
JOIN Player p ON hp.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.birthday)) <= 30;
